title: Maxillaria macrantha
taxonomy: Maxillaria macrantha belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is a species of orchid. It is a member of the genus Maxillaria, which is a diverse group of orchids that are native to the Americas. The genus Maxillaria is further divided into several subgenera, and M. macrantha is classified within one of these subgroups. The classification of M. macrantha is based on its unique characteristics, including its flowers and growth habits. As a result, M. macrantha is considered a distinct species within the larger family Orchidaceae.
